name: CMP_TCS_STMT
description: Setup Table that stores the statement definition. Captures the Eligibility Profile, Summary page description details and the additional information details, latest date on which statement is generated using the setup

columns.Name: STMT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_SALARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: DISPLAY_SALARY_FLAG

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: NAME

columns.Name: EE_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Employee Profile id

columns.Name: STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Processing Status of the Statement.

columns.Name: INDICATE_ESTIMATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates to the amounts are esitimated Y or N

columns.Name: STMT_GENERATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: STMT_GENERATED_FLAG

columns.Name: HIDE_SMRY_DESC_TXT_FLAG
columns.Comments: HIDE_SMRY_DESC_TXT_FLAG

columns.Name: SMRY_DESC_TXT_ORDR_NUM
columns.Comments: SMRY_DESC_TXT_ORDR_NUM

columns.Name: HIDE_SMRY_FLAG
columns.Comments: HIDE_SMRY_FLAG

columns.Name: HIDE_SMRY_ADDL_INFO_FLAG
columns.Comments: HIDE_SMRY_ADDL_INFO_FLAG

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: PDF_LOCAL_CURR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the local currency is selected for PDF generation for this statement.

columns.Name: PDF_LOCAL_CURR_AVLBL
columns.Comments: Stores who can view the PDF statement for the local currency.

columns.Name: PDF_OTHER_CURR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the other currency is selected for PDF generation for this statement.

columns.Name: PDF_OTHER_CURR_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the value of the other currency code.

columns.Name: PDF_OTHER_CURR_AVLBL
columns.Comments: Stores who can view the PDF statement for the other  currency.

columns.Name: CURR_SWITCHER_DEFAULT
columns.Comments: Store the default switcher currency type in which the detail page of online statements display.

columns.Name: HIDE_PDF_ITEM_DETAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Setup Option to configure the display of line item details section in PDF

columns.Name: HIDE_OL_DRILL_SECTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Setup Option to configure the display of drill sections in Online Statement

columns.Name: DISPLAY_JOB_FLAG
columns.Comments: DISPLAY_JOB_FLAG

columns.Name: DISPLAY_POSITION_FLAG
columns.Comments: DISPLAY_POSITION_FLAG
